label: SES-035 v0.5 slice E build-execution closeout: 1 session, 0 decisions, 0 planning items, 2 references

session.title: v0.5 slice E — closeout (version 0.5.0, README release note, end-to-end integration smoke, full regression pass)
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code conversation against the slice prompt at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-E-closeout.md. Fifth and final v0.5 build slice. Single-commit session landing at 16e7a62. No transcript preserved per DEC-025.
session.topics_covered:
Seed prompt: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-E-closeout.md. Four categories of mechanical closeout work for the v0.5 release: version bump in crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/__init__.py from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 per the CLAUDE.md v2 version-source convention (no other file carries the version; the About dialog reads via importlib.metadata with __version__ as fallback); README release note added to crmbuilder-v2/README.md above the v0.4 entry per most-recent-first ordering with the one-paragraph summary plus bullet list format mirroring v0.4; end-to-end integration smoke test added at tests/crmbuilder_v2/integration/test_v0_5_end_to_end.py (271 lines) exercising the full lifecycle — dogfood migration → CBM single-gesture creation → cross-engagement scope verification → switch-back-and-forth; and a final regression pass green across the full suite via uv run pytest tests/crmbuilder_v2/.

The README release note covers the engagement entity type with its ten fields and the v1-mirroring code constraint; the multi-engagement routing infrastructure (meta DB with its own Alembic chain, per-engagement DBs with the v0.4 chain applied lazily at engagement-open, two-database API server, cross-restart active-state persistence via current_engagement.json); the one-shot dogfood migration with the three install scenarios handled and idempotency on rerun; the Engagements sidebar group and management panel; and the top-strip switching affordance plus the picker, activation worker, activation overlay, and single-gesture creation+activation flow from slices C and D.

The end-to-end smoke test simulates the full v0.5 lifecycle using in-process subprocess no-op managers (the smoke is integration over the activation orchestration and per-engagement scoping; the real production subprocess spawn is exercised by manual smoke and by the slice A follow-up). This no-op test-double pattern is what masked the latent CRMBUILDER_V2_DB_PATH and data_dir-derivation bugs that surface only in the real-subprocess case — caught in SES-030 (slice D follow-up). A small adjustment to tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_about_dialog.py was needed to accommodate the new __version__ value.

After this slice v0.5 is shippable. The status-entity update from 'v0.4 complete' to 'v0.5 complete' was originally specified as operator-authored after slice E lands through the desktop versioned-replace dialog; that step is being batched with the build-execution session records in this very closeout (apply-v0.5-build-execution-closeout.md) for efficiency. The v0.5 build's session records (this one plus SES-031 through SES-034) are also authored at this closeout per the in-sandbox close-out convention.
session.artifacts_produced:
Commit 16e7a62 on origin/main — v2: v0.5 slice E — closeout (version 0.5.0, README release note, end-to-end integration smoke, full regression pass green). Modified crmbuilder-v2/README.md (+72 lines for v0.5 release note); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/__init__.py (__version__ = '0.5.0'); tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_about_dialog.py (+6 lines for new version assertion). Created tests/crmbuilder_v2/integration/__init__.py; tests/crmbuilder_v2/integration/test_v0_5_end_to_end.py (271 lines). 346 insertions, 5 deletions across 5 files.

Full v2 suite green at session end. Lint clean.

No PRD changes; no decisions or planning items written; no MCP-server bumps required for v0.5.
session.in_flight_at_end:
v0.5 is shippable. Remaining operator-authored work originally identified by slice E: (1) status entity versioned-replace from 'v0.4 complete' to 'v0.5 complete'; (2) SES-NNN session record application for all v0.5 build-execution conversations. Both items are being batched and executed by the apply-v0.5-build-execution-closeout.md prompt (this closeout) rather than as separate post-slice operator steps.

The paper-test workstream (DEC-077) is now fully unblocked after the closeout — the next Claude.ai conversation can be the paper-test kickoff against a freshly-created CBM engagement using the single-gesture flow per slice D's UX.
